detectors.description:
Reentrancy in ERC20Token._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ERC20Token.sol#653-777):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (ERC20Token.sol#717)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (ERC20Token.sol#791-803)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (ERC20Token.sol#723)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (ERC20Token.sol#811)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (ERC20Token.sol#775)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (ERC20Token.sol#937)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (ERC20Token.sol#917)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (ERC20Token.sol#919)
	ERC20Token._rOwned (ERC20Token.sol#323) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ERC20Token._takeTeam(uint256) (ERC20Token.sol#931-939)
	- ERC20Token._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (ERC20Token.sol#891-927)
	- ERC20Token.balanceOf(address) (ERC20Token.sol#479-483)
	- ERC20Token.constructor() (ERC20Token.sol#413-443)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (ERC20Token.sol#775)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (ERC20Token.sol#945)
	ERC20Token._rTotal (ERC20Token.sol#337) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ERC20Token._getCurrentSupply() (ERC20Token.sol#1087-1097)
	- ERC20Token._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (ERC20Token.sol#943-949)
	- ERC20Token.constructor() (ERC20Token.sol#413-443)
	- ERC20Token.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (ERC20Token.sol#575-597)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [ERC20Token._transfer(address,address,uint256)](ERC20Token.sol#L653-L777):
	External calls:

	External calls sending eth:

		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](ERC20Token.sol#L937)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](ERC20Token.sol#L917)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](ERC20Token.sol#L919)
	[ERC20Token._rOwned](ERC20Token.sol#L323) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [ERC20Token._takeTeam(uint256)](ERC20Token.sol#L931-L939)
	- [ERC20Token._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](ERC20Token.sol#L891-L927)
	- [ERC20Token.balanceOf(address)](ERC20Token.sol#L479-L483)
	- [ERC20Token.constructor()](ERC20Token.sol#L413-L443)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](ERC20Token.sol#L775)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](ERC20Token.sol#L945)
	[ERC20Token._rTotal](ERC20Token.sol#L337) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [ERC20Token._getCurrentSupply()](ERC20Token.sol#L1087-L1097)
	- [ERC20Token._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](ERC20Token.sol#L943-L949)
	- [ERC20Token.constructor()](ERC20Token.sol#L413-L443)
	- [ERC20Token.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](ERC20Token.sol#L575-L597)
